items.body:
This PR migrates `@azure/arm-recoveryservices-siterecovery` from v5.3.0 (classic generation) to v6.0.0-beta.1 (modular generation). CI checks are passing. The CHANGELOG correctly compares with v5.3.0, `KnownVersions.V20250801` follows the correct naming convention, and Breaking Changes sections are properly included. **2 tool issues found**: both `ErrorAdditionalInfo.info` and `OperationsDiscovery.properties` regressed from `Record(string, unknown)` to `any` — these should be reported to the autorest.typescript generator.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37610,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/recoveryservicessiterecovery/arm-recoveryservices-siterecovery/review/arm-recoveryservices-siterecovery-node.api.md","line":1284,"issueType":"tool","category":"any-type","description":"ErrorAdditionalInfo.info typed as `any` instead of `Record(string, unknown)` — regression from v5.3.0"},{"file":"sdk/recoveryservicessiterecovery/arm-recoveryservices-siterecovery/review/arm-recoveryservices-siterecovery-node.api.md","line":3894,"issueType":"tool","category":"any-type","description":"OperationsDiscovery.properties typed as `any` instead of `Record(string, unknown)` — regression from v5.3.0"}]}
```

</details>
